parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2048, system: 'You are a business development analyst for ProFit Swimming Academy. Analyze pools for PARTNERSHIP potential. ProFit needs: private/semi-private pools in residential areas, family-friendly, good ratings, accessible for coaches with equipment. Respond with ONLY a raw JSON array — no markdown, no backticks.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Rank these pools in ' + $json.area + ' for partnership potential.

Pools:
' + JSON.stringify($json.pools, null, 2) + '

Respond with JSON array:
[{"name": "...", "score": 1-10, "fit": "excellent|good|medium|poor", "reason": "...", "approach": "recommended outreach"}]

Sort by score descending.' }] }) }}
